goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'leave after 08:15'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'arbury lodge guesthouse'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '1 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should leave after 08:15
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called arbury lodge guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
